title: FiskFlavour
description: A fully client-side vanilla-like experiance intended to enhance your time on servers without giving you an unfair advantage.
body:
# Fisk Flavour

This modpack is a mix of performance, QoL and cosmetic client-side mods ment to enhance your experiance without changing it too much or give you an unfair advantage on servers.

All servers are diffrent, but the modpack is created and configured to seamlessly let you play with friends who aren't using it. 

## Out of the box experiance
This modpack comes pre-configured to give you access to new tools and features without intrusive menus or odd quirks. You'll bearly notice you are playing modded out of the box!

Ofcourse you can further configure your game if there is something specific that bothers you.
Please do keep in mind that mods are powerful. Some features provided(most turned off be default) might be considered cheating by other players. **Be nice and play fair.** Refrain from using them or simply turn them off to resist the temptation.

## Features:
- Inventory sorting
- Better item interactions
- New animations and effects
- Tweaked "Modernized" UI
- More 3D (Blocks and player skins)
- Death log
- Better statistics
- Lots and lots of optimazation
- Shaders

Simply faster and prettier.
